nasb.text: for they cannot even die anymore, because they are like angels, and are sons of God, being sons of the resurrection.

esv.text: for they cannot die anymore, because they are equal to angels and are sons of God, being sons  of the resurrection.

cnv.text: 他們和天使一樣，不能再死；既然是復活了的人，就是　神的兒子了。

ccb.text: 就像天使一样永远不会死。他们既然从死里复活，就是上帝的儿女。

csbs.text: 事实上，他们再也不会死，因为就与天使一样；他们既然是复活的儿女，就是神的儿女了。
